tools.name: attachments_get
tools.description: Get a single attachment. Required: id. Returns the Attachment.

tools.name: audit-entry-types_get
tools.description: Fetch the catalog of audit log entry types Linear supports (e.g. user authentication, permission change, data export, setting modification). Returns each type's `type` slug and human-readable `description`. Use to enumerate the kinds of audited actions before filtering an `AuditEntry` query, not to fetch the audit entries themselves.

tools.name: auth-resolver-responses_get
tools.description: Get a single authresolverresponse. Returns the AuthResolverResponse.

tools.name: authentication-session-responses_get
tools.description: Get a single authenticationsessionresponse. Returns the AuthenticationSessionResponse.

tools.name: email-intake-addresses_get
tools.description: Get a single emailintakeaddress. Required: id. Returns the EmailIntakeAddress.

tools.name: favorites_get
tools.description: Get a single favorite. Required: id. Returns the Favorite.

tools.name: initiative-relations_get
tools.description: Get a single initiativerelation. Required: id. Returns the InitiativeRelation.

tools.name: initiative-to-projects_get
tools.description: Get a single initiativetoproject. Required: id. Returns the InitiativeToProject.

tools.name: initiatives_get
tools.description: Get a single initiative. Required: id. Returns the Initiative.

tools.name: integrations_create
tools.description: Create a Linear integration via the issueCreate-style mutation pipeline. Required: a `service` slug identifying the integration provider (e.g. `slack`, `github`) plus the OAuth/API config payload that service expects. Returns the new Integration's id, service, and connection state. Most users wire integrations through Linear's web UI; reach for this only when scripting workspace setup or migrating across orgs.

tools.name: integrations_delete
tools.description: Delete an existing Linear integration by id. Required: `id`. Optional: pass a flag to skip uninstalling the connection on the external service side (leave the third-party app installed even after Linear forgets it). Returns the removed Integration. Destructive — disables any automation or webhooks the integration was driving.

tools.name: issue-priority-values_get
tools.description: Get a single issuepriorityvalue. Returns the IssuePriorityValue.

tools.name: organizations_get
tools.description: Fetch the authenticated workspace (Linear `Organization`). No id needed — Linear scopes this to the workspace the API key belongs to. Returns workspace-level metadata: `id`, `name`, `urlKey`, plan/feature flags, member count, and policy settings. Use to detect plan tier, urlKey, or feature availability before calling features that are plan-gated.

tools.name: project-labels_get
tools.description: Get a single projectlabel. Required: id. Returns the ProjectLabel.

tools.name: project-milestones_get
tools.description: Get a single projectmilestone. Required: id. Returns the ProjectMilestone.

tools.name: project-relations_get
tools.description: Get a single projectrelation. Required: id. Returns the ProjectRelation.

tools.name: project-statuses_get
tools.description: Get a single projectstatus. Required: id. Returns the ProjectStatus.

tools.name: projects_get
tools.description: Get a single project. Required: id. Returns the Project.

tools.name: release-notes_get
tools.description: Get a single releasenote. Required: id. Returns the ReleaseNote.

tools.name: release-pipelines_get
tools.description: Fetch a single release pipeline by id. Required: `id` (the pipeline's UUID). Returns the pipeline's name, slug, color, owning team, and `approximateReleaseCount`. Use after `release-pipelines_list` (or a search) to load pipeline details before listing the releases inside it.

tools.name: release-stages_get
tools.description: Get a single releasestage. Required: id. Returns the ReleaseStage.

tools.name: releases_get
tools.description: Get a single release. Required: id. Returns the Release.

tools.name: roadmap-to-projects_get
tools.description: Get a single roadmaptoproject. Required: id. Returns the RoadmapToProject.

tools.name: roadmaps_get
tools.description: Get a single roadmap. Required: id. Returns the Roadmap.

tools.name: teams_get
tools.description: Fetch a single team by id. Required: `id` (team UUID — the team `key` like `ENG` does not work here; resolve key→UUID via `teams_list` or the local store first). Returns the Team object with id, key, name, color, owning organization, and references to the active cycle, default state, and feature flags. Use when you already have a UUID; for lookups by key or name, prefer `teams_list` with a filter.

tools.name: templates_get
tools.description: Fetch a single issue or document template by id. Required: `id`. Returns the template's name, type (issue / document / project), team scope, color, and the body / template data agents can apply when creating new entities. Use to render a template before substituting into an `issueCreate` or `documentCreate` mutation.

tools.name: user-settingses_get
tools.description: Fetch a UserSettings record by id (one settings row per user; UserSettings.id != User.id). Returns the user's notification preferences, calendar prefs, and `autoAssignToSelf` default. Use this when an agent needs to read a teammate's preferences before honoring them; for the authenticated user's own settings, the `viewer` query is the simpler path.

tools.name: users_get
tools.description: Fetch a single Linear workspace user by id. Required: `id` (user UUID — `me` is NOT accepted here; use the `viewer` query for the authenticated user). Returns the User object with name, displayName, email, active flag, admin flag, avatarUrl, and team memberships. Use after resolving an email or display name through `users_list`.
